title: crunchy cast-iron seared syrian steak tips grill
description: a keto-friendly, high-protein syrian dish featuring sirloin steak tips, wok-hei, and a rich, gooey sauce.
instructions: Preheat the raclette-grill pan to 400f over medium-high heat.
Season the sirloin steak tips with salt, black pepper, and a pinch of paprika.
Add 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the preheated pan and sear the steak tips for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned.
Remove the steak tips from the pan and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the pan, then add the sliced onions and bell peppers.
Cook the vegetables for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for an additional minute.
In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, soy sauce, and honey.
Pour the sauce into the pan and bring to a simmer.
Return the steak tips to the pan and spoon some of the sauce over the top.
Continue to cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the steak tips are cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Serve the steak tips hot, garnished with chopped parsley and a side of additional sauce if desired.
